sources.literature: deep Opus curation of flux papers
sources.bacdive: BacDive (free API 2026): growth conditions + MediaDive-linked media + metabolite-utilization phenotypes
sources.phenotypes: BacDive metabolite utilization + literature Biolog/PM + PMkbase (P. putida strain-resolved Biolog PM)

design: species-first: per-species shards (data/species/<slug>.json), clickable growth-rate plot, drill-down records + phenotypes, all tables downloadable
derived_metrics: per-species: mu_max, biomass yield Yxs + maintenance NGAM (qS-vs-mu fit, r2>=0.6), overflow byproducts, cardinal/optimum temperature, oxygen preference, substrate spectrum; COBRApy constraint export per record
